1. Search for `.dashboard-briefing` in CSS files to find the current styles
2. Find the JSX component that renders the dashboard briefing (likely in client/src/components/Analytics/ or similar)
3. Read the full CSS file and JSX component file so I can understand the current layout, structure, data displayed, and styling
4. Also check what data/props flow into this component - what stats are shown?
5. Look at any parent component that renders the dashboard briefing to understand context

Be thorough - I need the complete picture of HTML structure, CSS styling, and data flow.

content.text: Perfect! Now let me verify the backend structure by checking the API responses:

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed report for the user.

## Complete Analysis: `.dashboard-briefing` Component

I've thoroughly analyzed the `.dashboard-briefing` component throughout the iskrib_v3 codebase. Here's the complete picture:

### File Structure

**Location:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\DashboardBriefing\`

Files:
- `DashboardBriefing.jsx` - Main container component
- `DashboardBriefing.css` - All styling (726 lines)
- `RecapSection.jsx` - Weekly stats recap display
- `PromptSection.jsx` - Daily prompt display with responses
- `StatTile.jsx` - Individual stat card component
- `BestPostCard.jsx` - Highlights best performing post
- `CommunityHighlights.jsx` - Shows community highlights (top writer, most reacted post)
- `PromptResponsesModal.jsx` - Modal showing all responses to daily prompt
- `recapCopy.js` - Text snippets for motivational copy
- `useAnimatedCounter.js` - Animated number counting effect

---

## HTML Structure & DOM Hierarchy

```
.dashboard-briefing (main container)
├── .dashboard-briefing-header
│   ├── .dashboard-briefing-header-left
│   │   ├── .dashboard-briefing-title (text: "Today")
│   │   ├── .dashboard-briefing-date (formatted date string)
│   │   └── StreakBadge (conditional)
│   └── .dashboard-briefing-toggle (collapse/expand button - conditional)
└── .dashboard-briefing-body
    ├── .dashboard-recap-v2 (AnimatePresence + Motion - conditional, collapsible)
    │   ├── .recap-encouragement (italic motivational text)
    │   ├── .recap-tiles-grid (4 columns, responsive to 2 on mobile)
    │   │   ├── .recap-tile (repeated 4x)
    │   │   │   ├── .recap-tile-icon (SVG icon)
    │   │   │   ├── .recap-tile-value (animated number: posts, words, reactions, views)
    │   │   │   ├── .recap-tile-label (lowercase label)
    │   │   │   └── .recap-tile-micro (italic micro-copy)
    │   ├── .recap-best-post (clickable card with gradient background)
    │   │   ├── .recap-best-post-badge (⭐ Best post this week)
    │   │   ├── .recap-best-post-title (2-line clamp)
    │   │   └── .recap-best-post-stats (reaction_count · view_count)
    │   └── .recap-community
    │       ├── .recap-community-label (UPPERCASE label)
    │       ├── .recap-community-item (repeated 2x - most active writer, most reacted post)
    │       │   ├── .recap-community-avatar (22x22px image)
    │       │   └── .recap-community-text (name + metric)
    ├── .dashboard-divider (1px line - conditional)
    └── .dashboard-prompt (conditional)
        ├── .dashboard-prompt-header
        │   ├── .dashboard-prompt-icon (bell icon SVG)
        │   ├── .dashboard-prompt-label (text: "Today's Prompt")
        │   └── .dashboard-prompt-category (colored badge - conditional)
        ├── .dashboard-prompt-text (large serif text: prompt_text)
        └── .dashboard-prompt-footer
            ├── .dashboard-prompt-write-btn (amber button with arrow)
            └── .dashboard-prompt-responses (conditional, clickable)
                ├── .dashboard-prompt-avatars
                │   ├── .dashboard-prompt-avatar-wrap (repeated up to 10)
                │   │   └── .dashboard-prompt-avatar (32x32px image)
                ├── .dashboard-prompt-count (text)
                └── [PromptResponsesModal overlay - conditional]
```

---

## CSS Styling Overview

**Key Design Features:**
- **Color scheme:** CSS variables (amber accent `#f59e0b`, glass morphism cards)
- **Typography:** Playfair Display (serif, headings), Lora (serif, body), Outfit (sans-serif, UI)
- **Layout:** Flex column throughout, responsive grid changes from 4 columns → 2 on mobile
- **Animations:** Framer Motion (entrance animations, collapse/expand), custom counter animation
- **Border/Shadow:** `border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-amber)` on main card

**Notable CSS Classes:**

| Class | Purpose | Styles |
|-------|---------|--------|
| `.dashboard-briefing` | Container | Card bg, 14px border-radius, 3px left border, shadow |
| `.recap-tiles-grid` | 4-stat grid | `grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr)` → 2 cols on mobile |
| `.recap-tile` | Stat card | Centered flex, 12px padding, hover lift effect |
| `.recap-tile-value` | Big number | Playfair 22px, font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums |
| `.recap-best-post` | Post highlight | Linear gradient bg (amber 8% → 3%), clickable hover |
| `.dashboard-prompt-text` | Prompt text | Lora serif 18px, left border 3px amber |
| `.dashboard-prompt-write-btn` | CTA | Amber bg, rounded pill (20px), shadow, hover darker |
| `.prompt-responses-*` | Modal styles | Overlay (fixed, inset 0), modal max-width 440px |

**Dark Mode Support:** `[data-theme="dark"]` selector updates all colors, uses lighter/transparent variants

**Mobile Breakpoint:** `@media (max-width: 480px)` adjusts padding, font sizes, grid columns

---

## Data Flow & Props

### DashboardBriefing.jsx (Main Component)

**Props:**
- `onWriteResponse` - callback when user clicks "Write your take" button, receives `{ id, promptText }`

**Hooks:**
```javascript
const { session, user } = useAuth();  // From Context
const { data: recapData, isLoading: recapLoading } = useQuery({
  queryKey: ['weeklyRecap', session?.user?.id],
  queryFn: () => getWeeklyRecap(session?.access_token),
  staleTime: 10 min,
});
const { data: prompt, isLoading: promptLoading } = useQuery({
  queryKey: ['todaysPrompt'],
  queryFn: getTodaysPrompt,
  staleTime: 30 min,
});
const { data: responsesData } = useQuery({
  queryKey: ['promptResponses', prompt?.id],
  queryFn: () => getPromptResponses(prompt.id),
  staleTime: 5 min,
});
const { data: streakData } = useStreakData(user?.id);
```

**Derived State:**
```javascript
const recap = recapData?.recap;
const personal = recap?.personal || {};  // User's own stats
const group = recap?.group || {};        // Community stats
const hasRecap = !recapLoading && recap && (personal.posts_written > 0 || group.total_posts > 0);
const hasPrompt = !promptLoading && !!prompt;
```

---

### Weekly Recap Data Structure (`personal` object)

From backend RPC `get_weekly_recap`:

```javascript
{
  posts_written: number,
  total_words: number,
  reactions_received: number,
  views_received: number,
  best_post: {
    journal_id: string,
    title: string,
    reaction_count: number,
    view_count: number
  }
}
```

**Related copy functions** (`recapCopy.js`):
- `getPostsCopy(count)` - motivational text based on post count (0→"blank page", 1→"seed", 7+→"prolific")
- `getWordsCopy(count)` - motivational text based on word count (0→"Every word counts", 5000+→"chapter")
- `getReactionsCopy(count)` - motivational text based on reactions
- `getViewsCopy(count)` - motivational text based on views
- `getOverallEncouragement(personal, streakCount, freezeAvailable)` - complex logic based on streak milestones

---

### Group Data Structure (`group` object)

```javascript
{
  total_posts: number,
  most_active_writer: {
    name: string,
    user_id: string,
    username: string,
    avatar: string,
    post_count: number
  },
  most_reacted_post: {
    journal_id: string,
    title: string,
    author_name: string,
    author_avatar: string,
    reaction_count: number
  }
}
```

---

### Daily Prompt Data Structure

From `getTodaysPrompt()`:

```javascript
{
  id: string (UUID),
  prompt_text: string,
  category: string | null
}
```

**Responses Data** (`getPromptResponses(promptId)`):

```javascript
{
  uniqueCount: number,
  count: number,
  responses: [
    {
      id: string,
      user_id: string,
      title: string,
      created_at: ISO datetime,
      users: {
        name: string,
        image_url: string,
        badge: 'legend' | 'og' | null
      }
    }
  ],
  hasMore: boolean
}
```

---

## Key Features & Behaviors

### 1. **Collapsible Recap Section**
- Uses `recapCollapsed` state stored in `localStorage` via `getWeekKey()` (Monday of current week)
- Toggle button rotates 90° when collapsed
- Smooth height animation using Framer Motion `AnimatePresence`

### 2. **Animated Numbers**
- `useAnimatedCounter` hook with `easeOutExpo` easing
- Duration: 900ms + 50ms per tile (staggered)
- Uses `tabular-nums` for consistent number width

### 3. **Conditional Rendering**
- Component returns `null` if no recap AND no prompt
- Recap section collapses (but toggle visible) if user has recaps
- Divider only shows if both recap + prompt exist and recap not collapsed
- Community highlights return `null` if no data for either item

### 4. **Parent Integration**
- Rendered in **PostCards.jsx** (home feed)
- Positioned at top of feed, appears before journal posts
- `onWriteResponse` callback triggers `handleOpenTextEditor({ promptId, promptText })` in parent

### 5. **Badges & Special Styling**
- Special avatar rings for "legend" (gold border + glow) and "og" (purple border + glow)
- Animated keyframes: `pr-glow-legend` and `pr-glow-og` (2s infinite alternate)

---

## Streak Integration

- Streak count displayed in header next to date
- Used in encouragement message logic (milestones at 1, 3, 7, 14, 30, 50, 100 days)
- `freezeAvailable` prop affects encouragement text ("safety net ready")

---

## Modal (Prompt Responses)

**PromptResponsesModal.jsx:**
- Overlay: fixed position, blur backdrop, dark overlay
- Uses `useInfiniteQuery` with cursor-based pagination (5 items per page)
- Max-width 440px, max-height 80vh
- Shows response author, post title, timestamp, and badges
- "See more" button at bottom for pagination
- Clicking response navigates to `/home/post/{id}`

---

## Summary of What's Displayed

| Section | Shows | Data Source |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| **Header** | "Today" + formatted date + streak badge | Date, streakData |
| **Encouragement** | Motivational text | `getOverallEncouragement(personal, streak, freeze)` |
| **Stat Tiles (4)** | Posts, Words, Reactions, Views | personal stats with animated numbers |
| **Best Post** | Star badge + post title + reactions + views | personal.best_post |
| **Community** | Top writer + most reacted post | group.most_active_writer, group.most_reacted_post |
| **Prompt** | Icon + "Today's Prompt" + category + prompt text | prompt object |
| **Write Button** | Amber button with arrow | Static UI |
| **Response Avatars** | Up to 10 unique user avatars with badges | responsesData.responses (first 10 unique) |
| **Response Count** | "X responses/response" link | responsesData.count or uniqueCount |

---

## Current Styling Notes for Redesign

1. **Typography stack:** Playfair (main), Lora (body/quotes), Outfit (UI)
2. **Spacing:** 14-20px padding, 8-12px gaps, 12px divider margin
3. **Rounded corners:** 10-14px (cards), 20px (button pill)
4. **Colors:** Heavy amber use (`#f59e0b`), card backgrounds, secondary text muted
5. **Mobile adaptation:** Padding reduces 20→16px, grid 4→2 cols, font sizes shrink slightly
6. **Interaction:** Subtle hover lift (translateY -1px), background color shifts, smooth transitions 0.15s

All files are located in `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\DashboardBriefing\` and `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\DashboardBriefing\DashboardBriefing.css`.
